sections.paragraph:
ἀντιμιμέομαι (s. μιμέομαι; Appian, Bell. Civ. 5, 41 §174; 5, 94 §393) follow the example τινά of someone IEph 10:2.—DELG s.v. μῖμος.

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 90м
